name: cost-query-agent
purpose: Query cloud cost and billing data from AWS Cost Explorer or Azure Cost Management for any time range and service filter.
description: Billing agent for querying cloud spend across AWS and Azure. Supports cost breakdown by service, region, granularity (MONTHLY/DAILY/HOURLY), and cost metric (AmortizedCost, UnblendedCost, BlendedCost for AWS; ActualCost, AmortizedCost for Azure). Multi-step execution for comparing multiple services or time periods.
capabilities: retrieve AWS cost data from Cost Explorer for any time period
retrieve Azure cost data from Cost Management API
filter costs by service, region, account-id, profile, and tag
support MONTHLY, DAILY, and HOURLY cost granularity breakdowns
compare costs across multiple services or periods via multi-step execution
